beats.title: Vola's Story
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens in the north tower with Vola recounting her captivity, Agata Dustmother, and the unfinished ritual before the party shifts from information gathering into operational planning.
dateEvidence: The manifest starts the session on 1748-04-12.
The DM opening says the sun is setting and the group is catching its breath at dusk.

beats.title: Scouting Plan
beats.boundaryReason: After hearing about the ritual and corrupted animals, the party stops questioning Vola and settles on a stealthy scouting approach with invisibility and a short rest.
dateEvidence: This discussion continues directly from the dusk tower scene on the same evening.
The group is still deciding whether to press on before full dark.

beats.title: Reconnaissance Run
beats.boundaryReason: Kenzo and Wellby make the first covert pass through the keep grounds, discover the ruined chapel, the undead gnoll, and the goat-like demon, then return to report after less than an hour.
dateEvidence: The scout happens after sunset once the courtyard is described as pitch black apart from the keep fires.
The party completes a short rest while the pair scout and return later the same night.

beats.title: Kill It Tonight
beats.boundaryReason: Back in the tower, the party analyzes the scout report, debates whether the ritual can wait, and finally crosses the courtyard to spring an ambush on the keep.
dateEvidence: The scene begins immediately after the night scout returns.
The approach to the keep is described as happening in full darkness with the fires as the only illumination.

beats.title: Ambush in the Keep
beats.boundaryReason: The assault opens with surprise attacks on the demon and undead gnolls, then the fight turns dangerous as the demon closes in and the party struggles to hold the line.
dateEvidence: This beat begins the moment initiative is rolled during the night ambush.
No rest or time jump intervenes before the fight escalates.

beats.title: Oduk Falls
beats.boundaryReason: The second phase of the battle centers on poison, emergency healing, and the final coordinated push that destroys the demon and mops up the last undead gnoll.
dateEvidence: The combat continues uninterrupted from the previous beat.
The demon vanishes and the last gnoll is finished off before the party begins any post-fight investigation.

beats.title: Searching the Ruins
beats.boundaryReason: With the demon down, the party searches the keep, puts out the ritual fires, finds more hobgoblin papers, and decides whether the tower is safe enough for the night.
dateEvidence: The battle has just ended and the group immediately begins searching before sleeping.
It remains full night outside, with darkness deepening as the main fire is banked.

beats.title: Troubled Rest
beats.boundaryReason: The party retreats to the tower, survives a night of bad dreams and incomplete recovery, and wakes at dawn to plan the next day's push against the remaining gnolls and the corrupted grounds.
dateEvidence: The manifest ends the session on 1748-04-13.
The rest resolves overnight and the DM explicitly says the party wakes in the morning.
